title: Roblox Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Roblox delivered strong Q3 2023 results with revenue of approximately $820 million, representing solid year-over-year growth. Bookings reached $1.70 billion, demonstrating 50% year-over-year growth momentum. The company achieved daily active users of 122.46 million, up significantly from 88.90 million in Q3 2022. Hours engaged reached 29.49 billion, up from 20.70 billion in the year-ago period. Management discussed the platform's strategic focus on creator tools, AI-assisted development, and audience expansion. The company highlighted progress in international markets and emerging user demographics. During the call, executives emphasized the platform's unique position serving younger audiences while expanding into older demographics. The company acknowledged profitability challenges but expressed confidence in long-term margin expansion. Management discussed investments in platform safety, developer economics, and content diversification. Analyst questions focused on sustainability of growth rates and timeline to profitability. The company provided full-year 2023 bookings guidance and outlined 2024 growth expectations.
